Our Services

Comprehensive solutions for individuals and businesses — all in one place.

Everything You Need, Under One Roof

At WICS Agency, we have carefully curated a suite of high-demand services to make your life easier. Our team handles each request with speed, professionalism, and attention to detail.

Call Now WhatsApp Us
Documentation & Administrative

Documentation Services

We handle all types of official documents including permits, certificates, attestations, apostilles, and administrative paperwork. Save time and let our experts manage the process from start to finish.

Call to Inquire WhatsApp
Satellite TV Subscriptions

CANAL+ Subscription

Subscribe or renew your CANAL+ package quickly and easily. We offer all CANAL+ plans with competitive rates. Same-day activation guaranteed.

Call to Inquire WhatsApp

DStv Subscription

All DStv packages available — Compact, Compact Plus, Premium and more. Fast subscription processing with instant activation.

Call to Inquire WhatsApp

StarTimes Subscription

Affordable StarTimes packages for all viewing needs. New subscriptions, renewals, and decoder sales available.

Call to Inquire WhatsApp
Travel & Ticketing

Flight Ticket Sales

Book domestic and international flight tickets through our trusted travel partners. We help you find the best routes and prices for any destination.

Call to Inquire WhatsApp
Insurance

AXA Motor Insurance

Official AXA Insurance partner for motor vehicle coverage. We offer third-party liability, comprehensive plans, and all standard AXA motor insurance products at competitive rates.

Call to Inquire WhatsApp
Courier & Shipping

DHL Express Services

Send documents and packages locally or internationally through DHL Express. We handle packing guidance, shipment booking, tracking setup, and pickup coordination.

Call to Inquire WhatsApp
Telecom Services

CAMTEL BLUE SIM – Sales

Purchase your CAMTEL BLUE SIM card with all standard plans for calls, SMS and mobile internet. Quick activation with identity verification support.

Call to Inquire WhatsApp

CAMTEL BLUE SIM – Recharge

Recharge your CAMTEL BLUE SIM with any amount. Fast, reliable, and no service fees. Available for all CAMTEL data and voice bundles.

Call to Inquire WhatsApp
